results.overview: Three children living in a displacement camp in northern Uganda compete in their country's national music and dance festival.
results.title: War Dance

results.overview: Ethan learns he carries the spirit of a warrior who battled dragons in 16th-century Korea -- and one day he'll find a tattooed girl carrying the spirit of that warrior's beloved. Years later, he meets Sarah and dragons soon descend on Los Angeles seeking out the two souls of the ancient lovers.
results.title: Dragon Wars: D-War
